sentences.english: The board has approved moving forward with the acquisition of TechNova.
What's the timeline for completing the deal?
We're targeting Q3 pending regulatory approval and due diligence.
sentences.korean: 규제 승인과 실사를 거쳐 3분기를 목표로 하고 있습니다.

sentences.english: How will this affect our existing team structure?
sentences.korean: 기존 팀 구조에 어떤 영향이 있나요?

sentences.english: There will be some overlap in engineering and sales so we'll need to work through a restructuring plan carefully.
sentences.korean: 엔지니어링과 영업에 중복이 있어서 구조조정 계획을 신중하게 마련해야 합니다.

sentences.english: Retaining key talent from TechNova should be our top priority.
sentences.korean: 테크노바의 핵심 인재를 유지하는 것이 최우선 과제여야 합니다.

sentences.english: Agreed. I've already asked HR to prepare retention packages for their senior engineers.
sentences.korean: 동의합니다. 이미 인사팀에 시니어 엔지니어를 위한 잔류 패키지를 준비하라고 했습니다.
